description: CompositionWhite round neck t-shirt made of Dri-Fit cotton fabric, with short sleeves, heat transferred nike swoosh on left sleeve and graphic on left chest FittingRegular  Wash careMachine wash or hand wash at 30 degreesDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron, but do not iron on printDesigned for style and comfort, this cotton t-shirt from nike speaks volumes of your sporting attitude. Made of Dri-Fit cotton fabric, this tee will keep you fresh all day, while you enjoy a fun-filled travel. Team this with denims or cargos and sports shoes for unparalleled cool.
